creator: rkoberman@gmail.com
text:
After updating mpv to 0.36, it segfaults on startup. Reverting to 0.35.1_5,1 restores normal operation. All files were H.264 in either mp4 or mkv containers.

I would be happy to provide a core dump (154M) or report on output of lldb commands.
(lldb) bt
 * thread #1, name = 'mpv/vo', stop reason = signal SIGSEGV
  * frame #0: 0x0000000057ed54c4
    frame #1: 0x00000000a3435c50
System is running main-n263931-5aee3e14d491 from July 3.
